title: Baton Scene Description (BSD): Schema Specification v0.3
description: A typed interchange schema for cinematic directorial intent. BSD captures what a film director wants — camera movement, lighting style, character emotional state, scene flow control — as structured, machine-readable data. It complements OpenUSD (scene realization) and OTIO (editorial timeline) by adding an intent layer: the format for what the director means. Includes JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for all three schema versions (v0.1, v0.2, v0.3) and the TypeScript source of truth.
notes: Camera movement and shot type vocabulary aligned with CameraBench/CineTechBench taxonomies. Schema designed for downstream mapping to OpenUSD scene graphs, AI video generation prompts, and OpenTimelineIO editorial timelines.
